title: The Problem Solvers | Max Junestrand at Legora
summary: Legora is an AI-native operating system that enables legal teams to autonomously plan, execute, review, and complete complex legal work end-to-end. The platform is built to leverage model improvements to transform legal work processes, with founders working closely with Anthropic.
